message:
feat(command): add LATENCY HISTOGRAM stub subcommand

Redis 7.0+ LATENCY HISTOGRAM returns per-command latency histograms.
This stub implementation returns an empty array since per-command
latency histogram tracking isn't implemented yet. Adds:
- HISTOGRAM subcommand that accepts optional command names
- Updated HELP output to list HISTOGRAM
- Unit tests for empty response and help inclusion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
